tests.name: Verifies CLAUDE.md declares type: custom
tests.description: Should verify project type is 'custom' before proceeding
setup:
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-1 && echo '## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/vision.md' > CLAUDE.md

tests.name: Blocks if Primary Document is missing
tests.description: Should block commit if Primary Document declared in CLAUDE.md doesn't exist
setup:
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-2 && echo '## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/vision.md' > CLAUDE.md

tests.name: Invokes update-primary-doc when Sync Rules configured
tests.description: Should invoke update-primary-doc to sync primary document with changes
setup:
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-3 && cat > CLAUDE.md <<'EOF'
## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/vision.md

**Sync Rules:**
| Changed Files | Document Section | Update Type |
|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| docs/catalog/*.md | Projects | Add/update entries |
EOF
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-3 && mkdir -p docs/catalog && echo '# Vision' > docs/vision.md

tests.name: Invokes update-claude-md when CLAUDE.md exists
setup:
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-4 && cat > CLAUDE.md <<'EOF'
## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/vision.md

**Sync Rules:**
| Changed Files | Document Section | Update Type |
|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| docs/catalog/*.md | Projects | Add entries |
EOF
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-4 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Vision' > docs/vision.md

tests.name: Handles milestone tracking
tests.description: Should include current milestone in commit context
setup:
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-5 && cat > CLAUDE.md <<'EOF'
## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/vision.md

**Current Milestone:** Phase 2 - Implementation
EOF
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-5 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Vision' > docs/vision.md

tests.name: Generates conventional commit with custom context
tests.description: Should generate feat/fix/refactor commit appropriate for custom project
setup:
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-6 && cat > CLAUDE.md <<'EOF'
## Project Type

**Type:** custom
**Primary Document:** docs/vision.md
EOF
cd /tmp/test-custom-commit-6 && mkdir -p docs && echo '# Vision' > docs/vision.md
